models.name: VSCHAOS
models.description: A vintage-flavoured neural audio synthesis package based on unsupervised / (semi-)supervised training of spectral information using variational auto-encoders, optimized for Max/MSP or PureData integration.

models.name: DDSP
models.description: A library of differentiable versions of common DSP functions (synthesizers, waveshapers, filters), allowing these interpretable elements to be used as part of a deep learning model for audio generation.

models.name: RAVE
models.description: A variational autoencoder for fast and high-quality neural audio synthesis, designed for real-time performance and integration into DAWs and Max 8.

models.name: AFTER
models.description: A diffusion-based generative model for real-time audio features transfer and exploration, blending style/timbre with structural inputs in MaxMSP and Ableton Live.

models.name: MRT2
models.description: A state-of-the-art open-weights model for real-time music generation, featuring a Python library for JAX/MLX inference and a C++ engine for efficient streaming audio.
